iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 05:00 - IMMINENT 100 (stable). 440kg 60% HEU under IAEA monitoring. Natanz underground facility entrance damaged (IAEA confirmed). Araghchi confirms stockpile, explicitly rejects ceasefire/negotiations on CBS. Mojtaba Khamenei status unclear (Trump: dead or not). No diplomatic path. IAEA considers Iran has material for 9 nuclear weapons if further enriched. Breakout capability intact but no test conducted.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 05:00 - IMMINENT 100 (stable). Israel launches simultaneous extensive strikes on Tehran AND Beirut. US Embassy Baghdad hit by rockets + 5 drones — most intense assault since war began. Abu Dhabi missile kills Palestinian resident. Saudi intercepts 37 drones. Dubai airport fire contained, flights resumed. Iran FM explicitly rejects ceasefire. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact. Trump says war "wrapped up soon" but no timeline. Brent $102.69 (+2.5%). 2000+ ME deaths total. 200 US troops wounded. Israel plans thousands more targets over 3 weeks.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 05:00 - IMMINENT 100 (stable). IDF simultaneous extensive strikes on Beirut alongside Tehran. 91st Division ground ops continue in south Lebanon. 886 killed in Lebanon per NYT, 850 per Al Jazeera (100+ children). 1M+ displaced. UNIFIL patrols fired on by non-state armed groups. No ceasefire signals. Hezbollah rocket barrages persist.

turkey.notes: Day 20 05:00 - IMMINENT 92 (rising). NATO discusses deploying Patriot PAC-3 at Incirlik (replacing Spanish PAC-2). Bloomberg: Iranian missiles intercepted are "messages for Turkey." Kurecik radar (EARLY WARNING) targeted. Operation Active Fence activated at Incirlik for missile intercept only. 3+ Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey. Iranian refugees flooding in. NATO alliance strain deepening. Missile debris landed in Dörtyol, Hatay Province.

india.notes: Day 20 05:00 - ELEVATED 25 (stable). India evacuating nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing act. Pakistan-Afghanistan war next door increasing regional pressure. No direct escalation signals.

russia.notes: Day 20 05:00 - IMMINENT 87 (stable). Russia continues arms support to Iran. Ukraine peace talks frozen. NATO fracturing over Hormuz benefits Russia strategically. No direct ME intervention yet. Missile intercepts over Turkey add NATO-Russia tension vector.

china.notes: Day 20 05:00 - CRITICAL 46 (rising). Trump delays China visit "a month or so" — war ongoing. Hormuz coalition demand was precondition for Xi summit, now shelved. China special envoy mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan (week-long effort). Diplomatic track frozen. Blockade rehearsals continue.

north_korea.notes: Day 20 05:00 - IMMINENT 78 (stable). 10 MRL missiles fired March 14 during US-SK drills. Kim observed with daughter. No new provocations in past 24h. Exploiting US security gap in ME. Monitoring for follow-up tests.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 05:00 - IMMINENT 100 (rising). Russia strikes Kyiv in RARE DAYTIME drone attack — debris on main square. Ukraine launches biggest drone assault on Moscow in a year (~250 drones over 2 days). Ukrainian FP-5 Flamingo missiles hit Votkinsk Machine Building Plant in Udmurtia (11 injured). Russia killed 6 with missile/drone strikes. 2 Ukrainian police killed by drone in Kupiansk. Reports Russia captured Pokrovsk, Myrnohrad, Huliaipole in early 2026. Peace talks dead — Moscow refused US delegation. Zelensky arriving UK Wed.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 05:00 - IMMINENT 100 (stable). Kabul hospital strike: 400 killed, 250 injured (Afghan claim). Pakistan denies, says hit military targets only. UNSC unanimously condemns terrorism from Afghanistan. Fighting enters 3rd week — border clashes kill 4 (2 children) in Khost. China special envoy spent week mediating, urges ceasefire. Pakistan declared "open war." October Qatar ceasefire completely collapsed. Gulf mediators (UAE/Qatar) bogged down in own war. No off-ramps in sight per Atlantic Council.

top_signals: US Embassy Baghdad hit by rockets + 5 drones — most intense assault since war began
Israel launches simultaneous extensive strikes on Tehran AND Beirut
NATO considering Patriot PAC-3 deployment at Incirlik over Iranian missile threats
Russia strikes Kyiv in rare daytime drone attack — debris on main square
Ukraine launches biggest drone assault on Moscow in a year (~250 over 2 days)
Kabul hospital strike: 400 killed — Pakistan denies targeting, Afghanistan calls it 'crime against humanity'
UNSC unanimously condemns terrorism from Afghanistan, extends UNAMA mission
Iran FM Araghchi explicitly rejects ceasefire AND negotiations on CBS
Brent crude jumps 2.5% to $102.69 amid Hormuz paralysis
Trump says war 'wrapped up soon' but allies refuse Hormuz coalition — NATO fracturing
Israel plans 'thousands' more targets over next 3 weeks
UAE reopens airspace — Dubai fire contained, limited flights resumed
Total ME death toll: 2,000+ (Iran 1,444, Lebanon 886, US 13, Gulf 20)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 19 00:00): ZERO de-escalation signals across all theaters. Pakistan-Afghanistan hospital strike is worst single event of that conflict. Iran FM explicitly rejects ceasefire. China mediating Pak-Afg is only diplomatic signal but no ceasefire materialized. All conflicts intensifying.

latest_news.headline: Rockets and 5+ drones hit US Embassy in Baghdad — most intense attack since war began
latest_news.text: Rockets and at least 5 drones launched at US Embassy in Baghdad Green Zone. One drone crashed inside compound. Black smoke rising. Iraqi air defenses engaged. Described as most intense assault since conflict began. Kataib Hezbollah commander previously killed March 14.

latest_news.headline: Israel launches simultaneous extensive strikes on Tehran and Beirut
latest_news.text: IDF announces simultaneous waves of 'extensive strikes' on Tehran (regime infrastructure) and Beirut (Hezbollah infrastructure). Dual-front offensive. Iran Red Crescent clinic damaged.

latest_news.headline: NATO considering Patriot PAC-3 deployment at Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: NATO considering reinforcing missile defense at Incirlik with Patriot PAC-3 system (replacing current Spanish PAC-2). Kurecik radar in Eastern Anatolia — closest early-warning to Iran — likely target of intercepted missiles. Bloomberg: intercepted missiles are 'messages for Turkey.'

latest_news.headline: Russia strikes Kyiv in rare daytime drone attack, debris crashes on main square
latest_news.text: Russia launched rare daytime drone attack on Kyiv. 194 of 211 drones downed. Debris crashed on main square. Different drone types targeting central Kyiv. Unusual timing.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine launches biggest drone assault on Moscow in a year — ~250 intercepted
latest_news.text: Moscow claims ~250 Ukrainian drones intercepted over 2 days on approach to capital. Biggest drone attack on Moscow in a year. Ukrainian FP-5 Flamingo missiles also hit Votkinsk Machine Building Plant in Udmurtia.

latest_news.headline: Kabul hospital strike: 400 killed, Pakistan denies — 'crime against humanity'
latest_news.text: Afghanistan says Pakistan airstrike on Omar Addiction Treatment Hospital (2000-bed) killed 400, injured 250. Pakistan denies targeting hospital, claims military installations only. Taliban calls it 'crime against humanity.' Fighting enters 3rd week. Border clashes kill 4 including 2 children.

latest_news.headline: UNSC unanimously condemns terrorism from Afghanistan, extends UNAMA
latest_news.text: UN Security Council unanimously adopts resolution condemning 'all terrorist activity' from within Afghanistan. Calls on Taliban to combat terrorism. Extends UNAMA mission 3 months. Does not name Pakistan directly.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20 05:00) — Global war probability 100%. Day 17 of Iran war sees simultaneous Israeli strikes on Tehran AND Beirut. US Embassy Baghdad hit by most intense drone/rocket assault yet. NATO scrambles to reinforce Turkey with Patriot PAC-3 as Iranian missiles target Incirlik/Kurecik radar. Russia-Ukraine drone war intensifies — daytime Kyiv attack + 250 drones on Moscow in a year. Pakistan-Afghanistan hospital strike kills 400 — no ceasefire path. Brent $102.69. Trump claims war 'wrapped up soon' but zero de-escalation in any theater. Alliance fracturing over Hormuz. Total ME deaths 2,000+. Situation stable-at-maximum across all primary theaters.
